# Status Badges for README

Add these badges to your main README.md to show the status of your CI/CD pipeline:

## GitHub Actions Workflow Status

```markdown
[![Frontend CI/CD](https://github.com/USERNAME/REPOSITORY/actions/workflows/frontend.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/USERNAME/REPOSITORY/actions/workflows/frontend.yml)
```

## Code Coverage

```markdown
[![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/USERNAME/REPOSITORY/branch/main/graph/badge.svg)](https://codecov.io/gh/USERNAME/REPOSITORY)
```

## Security

```markdown
[![Security Rating](https://sonarcloud.io/api/project_badges/measure?project=USERNAME_REPOSITORY&metric=security_rating)](https://sonarcloud.io/dashboard?id=USERNAME_REPOSITORY)
```

## Dependency Status

```markdown
[![Dependabot Status](https://api.dependabot.com/badges/status?host=github&repo=USERNAME/REPOSITORY)](https://dependabot.com)
```

## License

```markdown
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
```

## Node Version

```markdown
[![Node Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/node-20.x-green.svg)](https://nodejs.org/)
```

## Example Complete Badge Section

```markdown
# FixYourPrompts Frontend

[![Frontend CI/CD](https://github.com/probinson/fixyourprompts/actions/workflows/frontend.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/probinson/fixyourprompts/actions/workflows/frontend.yml)
[![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/probinson/fixyourprompts/branch/main/graph/badge.svg)](https://codecov.io/gh/probinson/fixyourprompts)
[![Dependabot Status](https://api.dependabot.com/badges/status?host=github&repo=probinson/fixyourprompts)](https://dependabot.com)
[![Node Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/node-20.x-green.svg)](https://nodejs.org/)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

A production-ready React application with comprehensive CI/CD pipeline.
```

## Deployment Status Badges

For deployment environments:

```markdown
[![Staging](https://img.shields.io/badge/staging-deployed-brightgreen.svg)](https://staging.fixyourprompts.com)
[![Production](https://img.shields.io/badge/production-deployed-brightgreen.svg)](https://fixyourprompts.com)
```

## Performance Badges

```markdown
[![Lighthouse Performance](https://img.shields.io/badge/lighthouse-performance-brightgreen.svg)](https://github.com/probinson/fixyourprompts/actions/workflows/frontend.yml)
[![Bundle Size](https://img.shields.io/badge/bundle%20size-optimized-brightgreen.svg)](https://github.com/probinson/fixyourprompts/actions/workflows/frontend.yml)
```

Replace `USERNAME/REPOSITORY` with your actual GitHub username and repository name.
